package rulecoverage

func NegativeExistsViaCountStar() string {
    ruleID := "exists_via_count_star"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "COUNT(*) used for an existence check instead of EXISTS or LIMIT 1."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
